devto.content:
---
title: "I Built AI Video Factory on a $35 Raspberry Pi (And It Runs 24/7)"
published: true
tags: [ai, automation, python, raspberrypi]
---

# AI Video Factory: AI自动写脚本、生成幻灯片、合成视频。零人工，全自动。

I built AI Video Factory to The best product is the one that runs itself. AI Video Factory is that product.

## What It Does

- **全自动视频生成:** AI从选题到成品，零人工干预
- **1080p幻灯片:** Pillow渲染精美幻灯片
- **AI脚本:** 自动研究热门话题生成脚本
- **背景音乐:** FFmpeg自动合成背景音乐
- **定时发布:** 每天7:00自动生成

## How It Works

The engine is pure Python stdlib — no pip install needed. Pillow handles graphics, FFmpeg handles video, and cron handles scheduling. That's it. Simple, reliable, zero-cost.

## Why Raspberry Pi?

- 💰 **Cost:** $35 one-time. No AWS bills.
- ⚡ **Always on:** 24/7 cron automation
- 🌍 **Offline-capable:** No cloud dependency
- 🐍 **Python stdlib:** Zero external deps

## The Code

```python
# Zero-dependency thumbnail generator
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw

img = Image.new("RGB", (1280, 720))
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
draw.text((640, 360), "AI Generated", fill="white")
img.save("thumbnail.png")
```

## What's Next?

The best product is the one that runs itself. AI Video Factory is that product.

---

*This is part of my [20 AI Products Stack](https://ulnit.github.io/agent-store) — all running on a $35 Raspberry Pi.*

https://github.com/ulnit/ai-video-factory
